meta.title: The most dangerous job a fighter pilot can get (Featuring Hasard Lee)
meta.description:
The suppression of enemy air defenses (SEAD), sometimes called the "Wild Weasel" mission, is vital for America's way of war... But it may just be the most complex and dangerous mission fighter pilots can be assigned. In this Crash Course, we talk about what goes into the SEAD mission with YouTube star, author, and F-35 pilot, Hasard Lee. 

Make sure to check out Hasard Lee's YouTube channel! 
https://www.youtube.com/c/HasardLee
